title: hieracium marjokense
intro: Hieracium marjokense, also known as the Finnish hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium marjokense include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium marjokense can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and leaves in tincture form.
